mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pa_txn_leasing_offer WHERE prospect_id = #{prospectId} ORDER BY created_on DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE pa_txn_leasing_offer SET company_id = #{companyId}, property_id = #{propertyId}, property_name = #{propertyName}, requirement_level = #{requirementLevel}, block_name = #{blockName}, floor_name = #{floorName}, unit_id = #{unitId}, base_amount = #{baseAmount}, discount_amount = #{discountAmount}, final_amount = #{finalAmount}, special_terms = #{specialTerms}, status = #{status}, approval_required = #{approvalRequired}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE pa_txn_leasing_offer SET status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
